description: Use the SNAP Graph Builder UI to visually construct and execute an image processing pipeline consisting of Read, Subset, BandMaths, and Write nodes. Load the multi-spectral image from /home/ga/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif. Configure the BandMaths node to compute a spectral index using the expression (band_2 - band_3) / (band_2 + band_3). Save the visual graph definition to /home/ga/snap_exports/visual_pipeline.xml and execute the pipeline to output the processed data to /home/ga/snap_exports/pipeline_output.dim.
